sentences.arabic: يَجِبُ عَلَيْنَا حِمَايَةُ مَعْلُومَاتِنَا الشَّخْصِيَّةِ عَلَى شَبَكَةِ الْإِنْتَرْنِتِ.
sentences.translation: Moramo zaštititi naše lične podatke na internetu.
sentences.translationEn: We must protect our personal information on the internet.

sentences.arabic: يَسْتَخْدِمُ الْخُبَرَاءُ بَرَامِجَ خَاصَّةً لِمَنْعِ الِاخْتِرَاقِ وَالسَّرِقَةِ الرَّقْمِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Stručnjaci koriste posebne programe kako bi spriječili hakovanje i digitalnu krađu.
sentences.translationEn: Experts use special programs to prevent hacking and digital theft.

sentences.arabic: مِنَ الضَّرُورِيِّ اخْتِيَارُ كَلِمَاتِ مُرُورٍ قَوِيَّةٍ لِحِسَابَاتِنَا.
sentences.translation: Neophodno je odabrati jake lozinke za naše račune.
sentences.translationEn: It is necessary to choose strong passwords for our accounts.
